# NFCPresentmentIntentAssertion.Error.systemEligibilityFailed

**Case**

The current system isn’t eligible to use this service.

## Declaration

```swift
case systemEligibilityFailed
```

## Presentment intent assertion errors

- **NFCPresentmentIntentAssertion.Error.systemNotAvailable**: The system is unavailable because it’s in the cool-down period.

items.description: The system is unavailable because it’s in the cool-down period.
